en: And the Pharisees and Sadducees came, and to test him they asked him to show them a sign from heaven.
zh: 法利賽人和撒都該人前來試探耶穌，求他顯個從天上來的神蹟給他們看。

en: He answered them, "When it is evening, you say, 'It will be fair weather, for the sky is red.'
zh: 耶穌回答：“黃昏的時候，你們說：‘天色通紅，明天一定是晴天。’

en: And in the morning, 'It will be stormy today, for the sky is red and threatening.' You know how to interpret the appearance of the sky, but you cannot interpret the signs of the times.
zh: 早上的時候，你們說：‘天色又紅又暗，今天一定有風雨。’你們知道分辨天色，卻不能分辨時代的徵兆嗎？

en: An evil and adulterous generation seeks for a sign, but no sign will be given to it except the sign of Jonah." So he left them and departed.
zh: 邪惡和淫亂的世代要尋求神蹟，除了約拿的神蹟之外，不會有甚麼神蹟給它了。”耶穌就離開他們走了。

en: When the disciples reached the other side, they had forgotten to bring any bread.
zh: 門徒到了對岸，忘記了帶餅。

en: Jesus said to them, "Watch and beware of the leaven of the Pharisees and Sadducees."
zh: 耶穌對他們說：“你們要小心，提防法利賽人和撒都該人的酵。”

en: And they began discussing it among themselves, saying, "We brought no bread."
zh: 他們就彼此議論說：“這是因為我們沒有帶餅吧。”

en: But Jesus, aware of this, said, "O you of little faith, why are you discussing among yourselves the fact that you have no bread?
zh: 耶穌知道了，就說：“小信的人，為甚麼議論沒有餅這件事呢？

en: Do you not yet perceive? Do you not remember the five loaves for the five thousand, and how many baskets you gathered?
zh: 你們還不明白嗎？你們是不是忘記了那五個餅分給五千人，又裝滿了多少個籃子呢？

en: Or the seven loaves for the four thousand, and how many baskets you gathered?
zh: 還是忘記了那七個餅分給四千人，又裝滿了多少個大籃子呢？

en: How is it that you fail to understand that I did not speak about bread? Beware of the leaven of the Pharisees and Sadducees."
zh: 我對你們講的不是餅的事，你們為甚麼不明白？你們要提防法利賽人和撒都該人的酵。”

en: Then they understood that he did not tell them to beware of the leaven of bread, but of the teaching of the Pharisees and Sadducees.
zh: 這時他們才領會耶穌說的不是要提防餅酵，而是要提防法利賽人和撒都該人的教訓。

en: Now when Jesus came into the district of Caesarea Philippi, he asked his disciples, "Who do people say that the Son of Man is?"
zh: 耶穌來到該撒利亞．腓立比的地區，就問自己的門徒：“人說人子是誰？”

en: And they said, "Some say John the Baptist, others say Elijah, and others Jeremiah or one of the prophets."
zh: 他們回答：“有人說是施洗的約翰，有人說是以利亞，也有人說是耶利米，或是先知裡的一位。”

en: He said to them, "But who do you say that I am?"
zh: 他問他們：“你們說我是誰？”

en: Simon Peter replied, "You are the Christ, the Son of the living God."
zh: 西門．彼得回答：“你是基督，是永生 神的兒子。”

en: And Jesus answered him, "Blessed are you, Simon Bar-Jonah! For flesh and blood has not revealed this to you, but my Father who is in heaven.
zh: 耶穌對他說：“約拿的兒子西門，你是有福的，因為這不是人 指示你的，而是我在天上的父啟示你的。

en: And I tell you, you are Peter, and on this rock I will build my church, and the gates of hell shall not prevail against it.
zh: 我告訴你，你是彼得，我要在這磐石上建立我的教會，死亡的權勢 不能勝過他。

en: I will give you the keys of the kingdom of heaven, and whatever you bind on earth shall be bound in heaven, and whatever you loose on earth shall be loosed in heaven."
zh: 我要把天國的鑰匙給你，你在地上捆綁的，在天上也被捆綁；你在地上釋放的，在天上也被釋放。”

en: Then he strictly charged the disciples to tell no one that he was the Christ.
zh: 於是耶穌吩咐門徒不可對人說他就是基督。

en: From that time Jesus began to show his disciples that he must go to Jerusalem and suffer many things from the elders and chief priests and scribes, and be killed, and on the third day be raised.
zh: 從那時起，耶穌開始向門徒指出，他必須往耶路撒冷去，受長老、祭司長和經學家許多的苦害，並且被殺，第三天復活。

en: And Peter took him aside and began to rebuke him, saying, "Far be it from you, Lord! This shall never happen to you."
zh: 彼得就把他拉到一邊，責怪他說：“主啊，千萬不可這樣，這事一定不會發生在你身上的。”

en: But he turned and said to Peter, "Get behind me, Satan! You are a hindrance to me. For you are not setting your mind on the things of God, but on the things of man."
zh: 耶穌轉過來對彼得說：“撒但！退到我後面去！你是絆腳石，因為你不思念 神的事，只思念人的事。”

en: Then Jesus told his disciples, "If anyone would come after me, let him deny himself and take up his cross and follow me.
zh: 於是耶穌對門徒說：“如果有人願意跟從我，就當捨己，背起他的十字架來跟從我。

en: For whoever would save his life will lose it, but whoever loses his life for my sake will find it.
zh: 凡是想救自己生命的，必喪掉生命；但為我犧牲生命的，必得著生命。

en: For what will it profit a man if he gains the whole world and forfeits his life? Or what shall a man give in return for his life?
zh: 人若賺得全世界，卻賠上自己的生命，有甚麼好處呢？人還能用甚麼換回自己的生命呢？

en: For the Son of Man is going to come with his angels in the glory of his Father, and then he will repay each person according to what he has done.
zh: 人子要在父的榮耀裡和眾天使一同降臨，那時他要照各人的行為報應各人。

en: Truly, I say to you, there are some standing here who will not taste death until they see the Son of Man coming in his kingdom."
zh: 我實在告訴你們，站在這裡的，有人在沒有嘗過死味以前，必要看見人子帶著他的國降臨。”
